$comment: Global OPNsense aliases shared across TAPPaaS modules. Referenced from module.json via 'alias:<name>'. Module-local aliases (module.json -> aliases) override entries here; collisions are warned.

private_ranges.description: RFC1918 private IPv4 ranges (10/8, 172.16/12, 192.168/16). Use when a rule should match any private network rather than a specific zone CIDR.
